THE_ARCHITECT_CUP_POWER_BURN_THE_MOUNTAI: Your cards are Exhausted when played. Add a random card from a different character into hand.

THE_ARCHITECT_CUP_POWER_FIND_SOMEONE_TO_: Whenever you play the same card again, add a [gold]Human[/gold] to your hand.
